hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】会议纪要显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年降息；【FINANCE】Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗官员在会谈前分别会见巴基斯坦调解员。

items.title: Fed officials still foresee rate cut this year, despite war impacts, minutes show
items.summary: Policymakers said they would need to remain "nimble" as they weighed the impact the war had on inflation.
items.title_zh: 会议纪要显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年降息
items.summary_zh: 政策制定者表示，在权衡战争对通胀的影响时，他们需要保持“灵活”。

items.title: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
items.summary: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.
items.title_zh: Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程
items.summary_zh: Visa 的新工具是主要银行和金融机构将人工智能融入其业务的更大努力的一部分。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iranian Officials Meet Separately With Pakistani Mediators Ahead of Talks
items.summary: There was uncertainty about whether a cease-fire would hold and the two sides could reach a long-term deal.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗官员在会谈前分别会见巴基斯坦调解员
items.summary_zh: 停火能否持续以及双方能否达成长期协议存在不确定性。

items.title: Bitcoin gains after core CPI rose a less-than-forecast 0.2% in March.
items.summary: Headline inflation rose 0.9% last month, driven by the sharp rise in energy costs due to the Iran war.
items.title_zh: 3 月份核心 CPI 上涨 0.2% 低于预期后，比特币上涨。
items.summary_zh: 受伊朗战争导致能源成本大幅上涨的推动，上个月总体通胀率上升 0.9%。

items.title: Bitcoin rebound faces oil shock, inflation test despite ceasefire relief as macro jitters persist: analysts
items.summary: Bitcoin trades at a macro crossroads, with derivatives positioning signaling caution despite ceasefire relief, analysts said.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，尽管停火缓解，比特币反弹仍面临石油冲击和通胀考验
items.summary_zh: 分析师表示，比特币交易处于宏观十字路口，尽管停火协议有所缓解，但衍生品头寸仍显示出谨慎态度。

items.title: BlackRock rips page from hedge fund playbook, applies it to exchange-traded funds
items.summary: BlackRock's Jeffrey Rosenberg has a leading role in the firm's liquid alt ETFs — which use a long-short strategy in ETF wrappers.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德借鉴对冲基金策略，将其应用于交易所交易基金
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的杰弗里·罗森伯格 (Jeffrey Rosenberg) 在该公司的流动性替代 ETF 中发挥着主导作用，该 ETF 在 ETF 包装中使用多空策略。

items.title: Behind China's 'active efforts' for an Iran ceasefire: Business trumps politics
items.summary: The big risk for Beijing is that the Iran war drags down global demand for the exports that are driving China's economic growth.
items.title_zh: 中国“积极努力”推动伊朗停火背后：商业胜过政治
items.summary_zh: 北京面临的最大风险是伊朗战争拖累了全球对推动中国经济增长的出口需求。

items.title: In New War With Israel, Hezbollah Defies Notion That It Was Crippled
items.summary: The Iran-backed Lebanese militant group surprised many with the intensity of its attacks on Israel in the current conflict.
items.title_zh: 在与以色列的新战争中，真主党否认自己已被削弱
items.summary_zh: 伊朗支持的黎巴嫩激进组织在当前冲突中对以色列的攻击强度令许多人感到惊讶。

items.title: Lebanon: Images of a Nation Uprooted by War
items.summary: A million people in Lebanon have fled their homes as Israel clashes anew with Hezbollah. This is what their lives look now.
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩：一个因战争而背井离乡的国家的形象
items.summary_zh: 随着以色列与真主党再次发生冲突，黎巴嫩已有一百万人逃离家园。这就是他们现在的生活。

items.title: This Hungarian Town Explains Why Orban Could Lose on Sunday
items.summary: Lake Balaton was beloved as a vacation spot. Now, luxury real estate projects serve many friends of Prime Minister Viktor Orban, and the locals are fed up.
items.title_zh: 这个匈牙利小镇解释了为什么欧尔班可能会在周日失败
items.summary_zh: 巴拉顿湖作为度假胜地深受人们喜爱。现在，豪华房地产项目服务于总理欧尔班·维克托的许多朋友，当地人已经厌倦了。

items.title: Offbeat Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here's what they learned
items.summary: Before the U.S and Israel began their war against Iran, about 20% of the world's oil was shipped through the narrow Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 另类华尔街研究公司表示，已派出一名分析师前往霍尔木兹海峡。这是他们学到的
items.summary_zh: 在美国和以色列对伊朗发动战争之前，世界上大约 20% 的石油是通过狭窄的霍尔木兹海峡运输的。

items.title: Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers
items.summary: The once close-knit community of Ngogo chimpanzees have been at loggerheads for the last eight years.
items.title_zh: 研究人员称，乌干达的黑猩猩陷入了残酷的“内战”
items.summary_zh: 曾经关系密切的 Ngogo 黑猩猩群体在过去八年里一直处于争执之中。

items.title: The bitcoin market is splitting in two. Here's who is buying and selling amid the war
items.summary: Six weeks of war have revealed that bitcoin's floor depends entirely on a handful of mandated buyers absorbing what everyone else is trying to get rid of.
items.title_zh: 比特币市场正一分为二。这是战争期间谁在买卖
items.summary_zh: 六周的战争表明，比特币的底线完全取决于少数强制买家吸收其他人都试图摆脱的东西。

items.title: Research with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to research with ChatGPT using search and deep research to find up-to-date information, analyze sources, and generate structured insights.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行研究
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行研究，使用搜索和深入研究来查找最新信息、分析来源并生成结构化见解。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Michael Burry says he's still betting against Palantir after Trump post boosts stock
items.summary: The investor of the "Big Short" fame said he continues to hold long-dated put options on the artificial intelligence software firm.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，在特朗普帖子提振股价后，他仍然看空 Palantir
items.summary_zh: 这位以“大空头”闻名的投资者表示，他继续持有这家人工智能软件公司的长期看跌期权。

items.title: Blue Owl caps private credit funds redemptions at 5% after steep request levels
items.summary: Blue Owl attributed the higher-than-usual requests to "heightened market concerns around AI-related disruption to software companies."
items.title_zh: 在要求水平过高后，Blue Owl 将私人信贷基金赎回上限限制在 5%
items.summary_zh: Blue Owl 将高于平常的请求归因于“市场对人工智能相关软件公司中断的担忧加剧”。

items.title: 'You are my god', Japan's PM tells British rock band Deep Purple
items.summary: Hard rock enthusiast Sanae Takaichi beamed as she met the rockers in her Tokyo office.
items.title_zh: 日本首相对英国摇滚乐队深紫说：“你是我的上帝”
items.summary_zh: 硬摇滚爱好者高市早苗在东京办公室见到摇滚乐手时，笑容满面。

items.title: Iran Has Been Consistent in War. Will It Be Consistent in Peace Talks?
items.summary: While President Trump’s war aims have changed by the moment, Iran has stuck to firm demands. The question is whether it will compromise in peace negotiations.
items.title_zh: 伊朗在战争中始终如一。和谈会保持一致吗？
items.summary_zh: 尽管特朗普总统的战争目标目前已经改变，但伊朗仍然坚持坚定的要求。问题是它是否会在和平谈判中妥协。

items.title: Iran Tries to Grasp Economic Devastation of War, and Find a Way Past It
items.summary: The vast scale of destruction wrought by U.S. and Israeli bombardment will make sanctions relief all the more vital to Iran’s government as it tries to negotiate a peace agreement.
items.title_zh: 伊朗试图应对战争造成的经济破坏，并找到摆脱困境的方法
items.summary_zh: 美国和以色列的轰炸造成的大规模破坏将使伊朗政府在试图通过谈判达成和平协议时解除制裁变得更加重要。

items.title: Growing List of Orban Loyalists Defecting Before Critical Election
items.summary: With Prime Minister Viktor Orban seeming vulnerable before Sunday’s vote, criticism is growing from within institutions his party once counted on for support.
items.title_zh: 关键选举前叛逃的欧尔班效忠者名单不断增加
items.summary_zh: 由于总理欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orban) 在周日投票前显得脆弱，他的政党曾经指望支持的机构内部的批评越来越多。

items.title: Federal judge blocks Arizona from bringing criminal charges against Kalshi
items.summary: Judge Michael Liburdi ordered Arizona not to bring any enforcement actions under state law against Kalshi, at least temporarily.
items.title_zh: 联邦法官阻止亚利桑那州对卡尔希提起刑事指控
items.summary_zh: 迈克尔·利布尔迪法官命令亚利桑那州不要根据州法律对卡尔希采取任何执法行动，至少暂时不要。

items.title: Binance offers UAE staff temporary relocation as Middle East conflict disrupts region
items.summary: The crypto exchange said its operations in the United Arab Emirates remain unchanged and that many employees have chosen to remain
items.title_zh: 由于中东冲突扰乱地区，币安为阿联酋员工提供临时安置
items.summary_zh: 该加密货币交易所表示，其在阿拉伯联合酋长国的业务保持不变，许多员工选择留下来

items.title: Crypto bill negotiations enter critical week as lawmakers return amid pressure to resolve stablecoin rewards
items.summary: Negotiations over how to treat stablecoin rewards are intensifying as lawmakers return to Washington D.C. next week.
items.title_zh: 随着立法者在解决稳定币奖励问题的压力下回归，加密货币法案谈判进入关键周
items.summary_zh: 随着立法者下周返回华盛顿特区，有关如何对待稳定币奖励的谈判正在加剧。

items.title: AI agents reshaping crypto development, trading and risk, with Cambrian and Ethereum Foundation
items.summary: Builders and researchers discuss how AI agents are transforming crypto, from development and trading to entirely new financial systems.
items.title_zh: 人工智能代理与 Cambrian 和以太坊基金会一起重塑加密货币开发、交易和风险

items.summary_zh: OpenAI 首席执行官 Sam Altman 是 Tools for Humanity 的联合创始人，也是 World 项目的首席开发人员。

items.title: Creating images with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to create and refine images with ChatGPT using clear prompts, iterate on designs, and generate high-quality visuals in minutes.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 创建图像
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 使用清晰的提示创建和优化图像、迭代设计并在几分钟内生成高质量的视觉效果。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: Alibaba leads $290 million investment for building a new kind of AI model as LLM limits emerge
items.summary: Startup Shengshu plans to use the money for a "general world model," paving the way for more practical robot applications.
items.title_zh: 随着 LLM 限制的出现，阿里巴巴领投 2.9 亿美元用于构建新型人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: 初创公司盛树计划将这笔资金用于“通用世界模型”，为更实际的机器人应用铺平道路。

items.title: Bhutan has sold 70% of its bitcoin in 18 months. It may have stopped BTC mining too.
items.summary: The kingdom's holdings have dropped from 13,000 BTC to 3,954 since October 2024, with $215.7 million moved out this year alone. Its last mining inflow over $100,000 was recorded more than a year ago.
items.title_zh: 不丹在 18 个月内售出了 70% 的比特币。它可能也停止了比特币的开采。
items.summary_zh: 自 2024 年 10 月以来，该国的比特币持有量已从 13,000 枚减少至 3,954 枚，仅今年就转移了 2.157 亿美元。其上一次挖矿资金流入超过 10 万美元是在一年多前。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Hedera (HBAR) drops 1.9%, leading index lower
items.summary: Cardando (ADA), down 1.3% from Thursday, was also among the underperformers.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：Hedera (HBAR) 下跌 1.9%，领先指数走低
items.summary_zh: Cardando (ADA) 较周四下跌 1.3%，也是表现不佳的股票之一。

items.title: Institutions' bitcoin positioning lacks conviction; CPI, Iran talks might help
items.summary: Institutions are betting on the bitcoin price hitting $80,000 through call options, but they are also buying downside protection.
items.title_zh: 机构对比特币的定位缺乏说服力； CPI、伊朗会谈可能有所帮助
items.summary_zh: 机构通过看涨期权押注比特币价格将触及 80,000 美元，但他们也在购买下行保护。

items.title: US government moves bitcoin possibly linked to steroid distribution conspiracy
items.summary: The U.S. government currently holds roughly 328,000 bitcoins, worth more than $22 billion at current prices, among other crypto assets.
items.title_zh: 美国政府转移比特币可能与类固醇分发阴谋有关
items.summary_zh: 美国政府目前持有约 328,000 枚比特币以及其他加密资产，按当前价格计算价值超过 220 亿美元。

items.title: Bhutan moves another $18 million in bitcoin as tracked holdings continue to shrink: Arkham
items.summary: Bhutan moved more bitcoin to a new wallet, continuing an outflow streak that has cut its holdings to 3,774 BTC from a peak of 13,000 BTC.
items.title_zh: 随着追踪持有量持续减少，不丹又转移了 1800 万美元的比特币：Arkham
items.summary_zh: 不丹将更多比特币转移到新钱包中，继续连续流出，其持有量从峰值 13,000 BTC 减少至 3,774 BTC。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems

items.title: Ray Dalio: Trump-Xi meeting to focus on trade, capital flows
items.summary: Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio told CNBC he is optimistic about the outcome of a meeting between the U.S. and Chinese presidents next month.

items.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
items.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙在年度信中提到了地缘政治、人工智能和私募市场的风险
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 在致股东的年度信中提到了美国成立 250 周年，并呼吁对美国理想做出广泛的重新承诺。

items.title: Final push for votes as challenger to Hungary's Orbán senses victory
items.summary: As Péter Magyar's opposition movement leads in the polls, tens of thousands of anti-Orbán supporters fill Heroes' Square in Budapest.
items.title_zh: 匈牙利欧尔班的挑战者最终赢得选票
items.summary_zh: 随着彼得·马扎尔的反对派运动在民意调查中领先，数万名反欧尔班支持者聚集在布达佩斯的英雄广场。

items.title: Artemis II mission was a triumph - now comes the hard part
items.summary: The mission was almost flawless but there are considerable obstacles ahead before a Moon landing.
items.title_zh: 阿尔忒弥斯二号任务取得了胜利——现在困难的部分来了
items.summary_zh: 这次任务几乎完美无缺，但在登月之前还有相当大的障碍。

items.title: Frontrunner for California governor denies sexual assault allegations
items.summary: The congressman is a leading Democratic candidate who is now facing calls to drop out of the race.
items.title_zh: 加州州长领跑者否认性侵犯指控
items.summary_zh: 这位国会议员是民主党的主要候选人，目前面临退出竞选的呼声。

items.title: Melania Trump's speech propels Epstein crisis back to forefront
items.summary: She has now placed herself squarely into the Epstein story and at odds with the administration, which wants to end the investigation.
items.title_zh: 梅拉尼娅·特朗普的讲话将爱泼斯坦危机推回到风口浪尖
items.summary_zh: 她现在完全融入了爱泼斯坦的故事，并与希望结束调查的政府发生争执。

items.title: Trump posts graphic video of slaying to argue for stricter immigration policies
items.summary: A Haitian migrant previously protected from deportation is acccused of beating a woman to death at a Florida petrol station.
items.title_zh: 特朗普发布杀人视频以主张更严格的移民政策
items.summary_zh: 一名先前受到保护免遭驱逐出境的海地移民被指控在佛罗里达州加油站殴打一名妇女致死。

items.title: Baseball statue broken as it is unveiled in Seattle
items.summary: The mishap occurred as a tarp was pulled off a bronze figure immortalising Hall of Famer Ichiro Suzuki.
items.title_zh: 西雅图棒球雕像揭幕时被打破
items.summary_zh: 事故发生时，名人堂成员铃木一郎的青铜雕像上的防水布被拉下来。

items.title: Man accused of coercing wife into sex with 120 men goes on trial in Sweden
items.summary: The 61-year-old denies threatening physical violence and plying his wife with drugs to force her into having sex with strangers.
items.title_zh: 瑞典男子被控强迫妻子与 120 名男子发生性关系，受审
items.summary_zh: 这位 61 岁的男子否认威胁使用身体暴力，也否认用毒品迫使妻子与陌生人发生性关系。

items.title: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
items.summary: Ismail Omar Guelleh, 78, has extended his already 27-year rule in a poll boycotted by the main opposition candidates.
items.title_zh: 吉布提总统以97.8%的得票率史无前例地赢得第六个任期
items.summary_zh: 78 岁的伊斯梅尔·奥马尔·贾勒赫 (Ismail Omar Guelleh) 在一项遭到主要反对派候选人抵制的民意调查中延长了他已经 27 年的统治。

items.title: How Lu Xun, a Famous Chinese Writer, Became a Cute Communist Mascot
items.summary: The Chinese Communist Party has turned Lu Xun, a Mao-era hero who excoriated the establishment, into a bland, Disney-style character.
items.title_zh: 中国著名作家鲁迅如何成为可爱的共产主义吉祥物
items.summary_zh: 中国共产党把鲁迅这个毛泽东时代的英雄，痛斥当权派，变成了一个平淡的、迪士尼式的人物。

items.title: U.K. Puts Chagos Islands Deal on Hold Following Criticism From Trump
items.summary: The plan to give Mauritius formal control of the islands, home to a U.S.-British military base, was called “an act of great stupidity” by President Trump.
items.title_zh: 特朗普批评英国搁置查戈斯群岛协议
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统称毛里求斯正式控制这些拥有美英军事基地的岛屿的计划是“极其愚蠢的行为”。

items.title: Killing of Masood Masjoody Exposes Deep Rifts in Canada’s Iranian Diaspora
items.summary: An Iranian activist in Vancouver disappeared after accusing two compatriots of wanting him dead. Then his body was found.
items.title_zh: 马苏德·马朱迪被杀暴露了加拿大伊朗侨民中的深刻裂痕
items.summary_zh: 温哥华的一名伊朗活动人士在指控两名同胞想要置他于死地后失踪。然后他的尸体被发现了。

items.title: Star Xu calls CZ a ‘liar’ as founders of world’s largest crypto exchanges argue over past allegations
items.summary: The dispute between the crypto exchange founders, which included a $1 billion wager from CZ, revives allegations dating back 11 years to Zhao’s time at OKCoin.
items.title_zh: 全球最大加密货币交易所创始人就过去的指控争论不休，徐星称 CZ 为“骗子”
items.summary_zh: 加密货币交易所创始人之间的纠纷，其中包括 CZ 的 10 亿美元赌注，使人们对赵在 OKCoin 任职 11 年前的指控重新提起。

items.title: The magic word for digital assets adoption and success: choice
items.summary: For the digital asset ecosystem of the future to flourish, investors need options, explains Sullivan.
items.title_zh: 数字资产采用和成功的魔咒：选择
items.summary_zh: 沙利文解释说，为了未来数字资产生态系统的蓬勃发展，投资者需要选择。

items.title: Trump-backed WLFI token drops 12% to record lows after team defends multi-million lending position
items.summary: World Liberty Financial responded to CoinDesk's reporting by saying it would "simply supply more collateral" if markets moved against it, a statement that did not reassure holders.
items.title_zh: 团队捍卫数百万贷款头寸后，特朗普支持的 WLFI 代币下跌 12% 至历史新低
items.summary_zh: World Liberty Financial 对 CoinDesk 的报道作出回应，称如果市场走势不利于其，它将“简单地提供更多抵押品”，但这一声明并没有让持有者放心。

items.title: How Telegram plans to turn crypto into a global payments network
items.summary: Nikola Plecas explains how TON is building crypto payments into Telegram and where the biggest opportunities for adoption lie.
items.title_zh: Telegram 计划如何将加密货币转变为全球支付网络
items.summary_zh: Nikola Plecas 解释了 TON 如何将加密支付构建到 Telegram 中，以及最大的采用机会在哪里。

items.title: Justin Sun’s frozen WLFI takes $11 million hit as World Liberty brushes off liquidation fears
items.summary: Tron founder Justin Sun’s World Liberty token position is down by more than $80 million, according to Bubblemaps data.
items.title_zh: World Liberty 消除清算担忧，贾斯汀·孙 (Justin Sun) 冻结的 WLFI 遭受 1100 万美元损失
items.summary_zh: 根据 Bubblemaps 的数据，Tron 创始人 Justin Sun 的 World Liberty 代币头寸减少了超过 8000 万美元。

items.title: ‘One basis point’: Benchmark says a fraction of NYSE’s $44 trillion market could drive Securitize growth
items.summary: Benchmark’s base case notes that even 0.01% of NYSE’s roughly $44 trillion market could exceed Securitize’s $4 billion asset base.
items.title_zh: “一个基点”：Benchmark 表示，纽约证券交易所 44 万亿美元市场的一小部分可以推动证券化增长
items.summary_zh: Benchmark 的基本案例指出，即使纽约证券交易所约 44 万亿美元市场的 0.01% 也可能超过 Securitize 的 40 亿美元资产基础。

items.title: Bittensor co-founder denies suspending subnet emissions after Covenant AI exit
items.summary: Bittensor co-founder Jacob Steeves denied suspending subnet emissions, and said token sales were less than 1% of his holdings.
items.title_zh: Bittensor 联合创始人否认 Covenant AI 退出后暂停子网排放
items.summary_zh: Bittensor 联合创始人 Jacob Steeves 否认暂停子网排放，并表示代币销售量不到他所持股份的 1%。

items.title: Using custom GPTs
items.summary: Learn how to build and use custom GPTs to automate workflows, maintain consistent outputs, and create purpose-built AI assistants.
items.title_zh: 使用自定义 GPT
items.summary_zh: 了解如何构建和使用自定义 GPT 来自动化工作流程、保持一致的输出以及创建专门构建的 AI 助手。

items.title: ChatGPT for customer success teams
items.summary: Learn how customer success teams use ChatGPT to manage accounts, improve communication, reduce churn, and drive adoption and renewals.
items.title_zh: 面向客户成功团队的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解客户成功团队如何使用 ChatGPT 来管理帐户、改善沟通、减少客户流失以及推动采用和续订。

items.title: Applications of AI at OpenAI
items.summary: Explore how OpenAI products like ChatGPT, Codex, and APIs bring AI into real-world use for work, development, and everyday tasks.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 的人工智能应用
items.summary_zh: 探索 ChatGPT、Codex 和 API 等 OpenAI 产品如何将 AI 应用于现实世界的工作、开发和日常任务。

items.title: Analyzing data with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to analyze data with ChatGPT by exploring datasets, generating insights, creating visualizations, and turning findings into actionable decisions.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 分析数据
items.summary_zh: 通过探索数据集、生成见解、创建可视化以及将发现转化为可行的决策，了解如何使用 ChatGPT 分析数据。

items.title: Financial services
items.summary: Explore AI resources for financial services, including prompt packs, GPTs, guides, and tools to help institutions deploy and scale AI securely.
items.title_zh: 金融服务
items.summary_zh: 探索金融服务的人工智能资源，包括提示包、GPT、指南和工具，以帮助机构安全地部署和扩展人工智能。

items.title: Responsible and safe use of AI
items.summary: Learn how to use AI responsibly with best practices for safety, accuracy, and transparency when using tools like ChatGPT.
items.title_zh: 负责任且安全地使用人工智能
items.summary_zh: 了解在使用 ChatGPT 等工具时如何负责任地使用人工智能以及实现安全性、准确性和透明度的最佳实践。

items.title: Writing with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for writing to draft, revise, and refine content with clear structure, tone, and intent.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行写作
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行写作，以清晰的结构、语气和意图起草、修改和完善内容。

items.title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
items.title_zh: Waypoint-1.5：适用于日常 GPU 的更高保真度交互世界

items.title: ALTK‑Evolve: On‑the‑Job Learning for AI Agents
items.title_zh: ALTK‑Evolve：AI 代理的在职学习

items.title: Safetensors is Joining the PyTorch Foundation
items.title_zh: Safetensors 加入 PyTorch 基金会

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: Holo3: Breaking the Computer Use Frontier
items.title_zh: Holo3：打破计算机使用前沿

items.title: Falcon Perception
items.title_zh: 猎鹰感知

items.title: Any Custom Frontend with Gradio's Backend
items.title_zh: 任何带有 Gradio 后端的自定义前端

items.title: Granite 4.0 3B Vision: Compact Multimodal Intelligence for Enterprise Documents
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 3B Vision：企业文档的紧凑型多模式智能

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。

items.title: Seeing sounds
items.summary: Mariano Salcedo ’25, a master’s student in the new Music Technology and Computation Graduate Program, is designing an AI to visualize and express music and other sounds.
items.title_zh: 看到声音
items.summary_zh: Mariano Salcedo ' 25 是新音乐技术和计算研究生项目的硕士生，正在设计一种人工智能来可视化和表达音乐和其他声音。
